entries.title: Apple Plans to Turn Devices Into AI Platforms
entries.summary: Apple plans to offer third-party artificial intelligence models alongside its own in-house models, Bloomberg reported Tuesday (May 5), citing unnamed sources. With this offering, users of the company’s software will be able to choose the model they want to use for tasks such as generating and editing text and images, according to the report. entries.title: Anchorage Digital Bridges the Gap Between AI Agents and Money
entries.summary: Anchorage Digital has launched a new category of institutional infrastructure designed to enable artificial intelligence agents to interact with capital, securely and compliantly. This infrastructure, Agentic Banking, provides a regulated trust, governance and settlement layer that allows institutions to fund and control agents operating on their behalf, Anchorage Digital said in a Tuesday (May [&

entries.title: Adoption Was AI’s Problem. Now It’s a Business Model.
entries.summary: Most enterprise artificial intelligence projects don’t fail because the technology doesn’t work. They fail because the technology never makes it into the workflow. That gap between pilot and production is now the defining problem in enterprise AI and the two largest independent AI companies just converged on the same answer. entries.title: Publishers Accuse Meta of Misusing Their Works in AI Training
entries.summary: Publishers are accusing Meta of misusing their works to train its Llama artificial intelligence model. In a federal class action lawsuit filed Tuesday (May 5), publishing houses Elsevier, Cengage Learning, Hachette, Macmillan, and McGraw Hill accused Meta and founder and CEO Mark Zuckerberg of violating copyright laws through “willful infringement” of millions of books […] The post Publisher

entries.title: Visa to Participate in Upcoming Investor Conferences
entries.summary: SAN FRANCISCO--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- Visa (NYSE: V) today announced its participation in the following investor conferences. On Tuesday, May 19, Chris Suh, Chief Financial Officer, will present at the J.P. Morgan Global Technology, Media and Communications Conference. entries.title: How Spirit Airlines customers can navigate payments
entries.summary: One consumer advocacy group is urging the airline’s customers to seek refunds “quickly” after the carrier’s abrupt shutdown.
